mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-standard-deviation rise in the housing market index (HOUST) over the next 5 trading days signals a surge in demand for housing-related goods and services, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: HOUST does not rise by 2 standard deviations over the next 5 trading days, or 5-day forward returns in periods with a HOUST surge are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) signals a reduction in supply chain bottlenecks, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in periods with a decline in INDPRO are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-standard-deviation rise in the unemployment rate (UNRATE) over the next 20 trading days signals a tightening labor market, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: UNRATE does not rise by 1 standard deviation over the next 20 trading days, or 20-day forward returns in periods with a rise in UNRATE are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-standard-deviation rise in the housing market index (HOUST) and a 1-standard-deviation rise in the unemployment rate (UNRATE) over the next 5 trading days signals a surge in demand for housing-related goods and services and a tightening labor market, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: HOUST does not rise by 2 standard deviations and UNRATE does not rise by 1 standard deviation over the next 5 trading days, or 5-day forward returns in periods with a HOUST surge and a rise in UNRATE are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: FEDFUNDS does not decline by 1 standard deviation over the next 3 months, or 20-day forward returns in periods with a decline in FEDFUNDS are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-standard-deviation rise in industrial production (INDPRO) signals a reduction in supply chain bottlenecks, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO does not rise by 2 standard deviations over the next 3 months, or 60-day forward returns in periods with a rise in INDPRO are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-standard-deviation fall in the unemployment rate (UNRATE) signals a loosening labor market, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: UNRATE does not fall by 1 standard deviation over the next 20 trading days, or 20-day forward returns in periods with a fall in UNRATE are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
